case_title: KAN, YUNG MIRANDA L vs. ANTONIO, BEN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAN, YUNG MIRANDA L AS TO DEFENDANT ANTONIO, BEN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-01-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-04-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-12-1993
OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-03-1994, CONTINUED TO JUL-05-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 CASE IS UNINSURED MOTORIST. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DECLARATION OF BILL HOM RE: UNINSURED MOTORIST CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAN, YUNG MIRANDA L

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-01-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON DEC-01-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JAN-03-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-05-1994, CONTINUED TO JAN-05-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 COURT DECLARES CASE AN "UNINSURED MOTORIST" ACTION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
